message:
fix(ensemble,pipeline,tokens): harden json.Marshal fallbacks, wire ProjectDir through pipeline, fix division-by-zero in token usage

Add error handling to four json.Marshal calls in ensemble that previously
discarded errors with _ assignments. When marshaling fails (e.g., due to
unserializable fields), fall back to hashing a deterministic string built
from the struct's key fields. Affected functions: hashContextPack() in
context_generator.go, ModeOutputConfig.Hash(), ModeOutputFingerprint.CacheKey(),
and modeVersion() in output_cache.go.

Add ProjectDir field to PipelineRunOptions so callers can pass the
resolved project directory explicitly rather than relying on os.Getwd()
inside PrintPipelineRun(). Update PrintPipelineRun() to prefer
opts.ProjectDir when non-empty. Wire s.projectDir through the serve
handler in handleRunPipeline() so HTTP-triggered pipeline runs use the
server's configured project directory instead of the server process cwd.

Fix potential division-by-zero in GetUsageInfo() when the model's context
limit is 0 (unknown model). Now checks limit > 0 before computing
UsagePercent, defaulting to 0.0 when the limit is unavailable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -162,6 +162,7 @@ func (s *Server) handleRunPipeline(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 	opts := pipeline.PipelineRunOptions{
 		WorkflowFile: req.WorkflowFile,
 		Session:      req.Session,
+		ProjectDir:   s.projectDir,
 		Variables:    req.Variables,
 		DryRun:       req.DryRun,
 		Background:   req.Background,
